params.name: Pascal's Barrel
params.description:
On Dec 11, 1648 AD, physicist Pascal proved the existence of hydraulic pressure through experiments.
This dilapidated wooden barrel was used by Pascal for his experiments. At that time, he inserted a long and thin pipe from the balcony of the building into the airtight wooden barrel filled with water downstairs and started filling it with water. He only poured a few glasses of water into the pipe, and as a result, the wooden barrel downstairs burst. This experiment proves that the pressure ex …
